description: Thin Agentic OS lane to Hermes profile map. Coordinator/reviewer calls bind aos-orchestrator per invocation; this file never creates installs, switches the sticky global default, or stores secrets.

orchestrator.purpose: Queue triage, cross-lane coordination, review, and escalation judgment.
orchestrator.escalation_note: Fail clearly if the scoped aos-orchestrator profile cannot start; never switch the sticky profile or substitute Codex.

hermes.purpose: Operating Hermes coordinator lane for dashboard and queue review work.
hermes.escalation_note: Fail clearly if the scoped aos-orchestrator profile cannot start; no fallback coordinator is permitted.

unassigned.purpose: Route ownerless or unknown-lane triage to the Operating Hermes coordinator.
unassigned.escalation_note: Fail clearly if the scoped aos-orchestrator profile cannot start; never substitute a workbench.

revenue.purpose: Prospect research, outreach drafts, sales prep, and CRM-ready summaries.
revenue.escalation_note: Escalate direct prospect-facing copy, pricing/scope decisions, unsupported claims, or repeated revision to Operating Hermes.

marketing.purpose: LinkedIn drafts, positioning, founder voice, website copy, and thought leadership.
marketing.escalation_note: Escalate core positioning, public founder voice, offer messaging, or repeated revision to Operating Hermes.

delivery.purpose: Client workflow maps, SOPs, implementation plans, QA, and acceptance criteria.
delivery.escalation_note: Escalate ambiguous client scope, client-facing deliverables, and acceptance-risk decisions to Operating Hermes.

operations.purpose: Queue hygiene, startup checks, internal planning, blocker summaries, and operating reviews.
operations.escalation_note: Use deterministic/local handling first; escalate only when judgment or cross-lane coordination is required.
